title: Impasse
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Impasse''''' was a [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Super Transport VII]] container ship. It was commanded by [[Chalmer Trillili]], leader of the [[The Scourge|Scourge Pirates]], who outfitted the 280 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] long ship with a single [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projector]] salvaged from an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]].

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]
